description_long: This object is a rectangular sign with a bright green background and bold white capital letters spelling 'EXIT' across its face. The sign is bordered by a thin white frame, giving it a clean and highly visible appearance. The body of the sign appears to be made from a solid, likely plastic or metal material, with a smooth, hard surface. The sides and back of the sign are plain and unmarked, with a uniform light gray color. The sign is designed to be mounted on a wall or above a doorway, serving as a clear directional indicator in public or commercial spaces. Its size and color scheme are optimized for high visibility in emergency or wayfinding situations.
description: A rectangular green sign with bold white 'EXIT' text and a white border, designed for high visibility in public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green face with large white 'EXIT' text and a white border.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, light gray edge with no visible markings or text.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, showing the 'EXIT' text and border clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the plain, light gray edge with no markings.
